report.summary: Fixed critical SEO-breaking 'use client' + metadata export bug on 4 newest pages, created 4 missing OG images (1200x630), and wired OG references into page metadata.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed 'use client' + metadata export conflict on token-unlocks-vesting-schedules-guide-2026 (SEO metadata was completely invisible to crawlers)
Fixed 'use client' + metadata export conflict on post-quantum-cryptography-quantum-resistant-crypto-guide-2026
Fixed 'use client' + metadata export conflict on socialfi-social-finance-creator-tokens-guide-2026
Fixed 'use client' + metadata export conflict on stablechains-stablecoin-optimized-blockchains-guide-2026
Removed broken next/head usage in token-unlocks page (doesn't work in App Router)
Converted React useState FAQ accordions to native HTML details/summary elements (no JS needed, better accessibility)
Identified 5 total pages with 'use client' + metadata bug (including older jupiter-dex-aggregator page)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: socialfi-creator-tokens-2026 (1200x630) — purple social-network node pattern, creator economy stats
OG image: stablechains-2026 (1200x630) — green stability theme, chain blocks, flat price line chart
OG image: crypto-kyc-aml-travel-rule (1200x630) — compliance shield icon, globe, document elements
OG image: jupiter-exchange-guide (1200x630) — Solana green theme, planet icon, swap arrows, routing paths
Updated socialfi page metadata to reference new OG image with full URL and dimensions
Updated stablechains page metadata to reference new OG image with full URL and dimensions

sections.title: Issues Identified (Not Fixed This Cycle)
items: jupiter-dex-aggregator-solana-trading-guide-2026 still has 'use client' + metadata export bug (older page, not from today's build)
All learn pages use hardcoded dark theme colors instead of CSS variables (inconsistent with tool pages)
No Breadcrumb component usage on token-unlocks page (uses custom breadcrumb HTML)
